words.example: We are studying Unit 1 this week.
words.exampleTranslation: 这周我们学习第一单元。

words.example: Let's begin with the starter unit.

People greet each other by saying hello.
words.exampleTranslation: 人们通过说你好来互相问候。

images.description: 每个学生都有自己的书

words.example: Some people like coffee, others prefer tea.
words.exampleTranslation: 有些人喜欢咖啡，另一些人喜欢茶。

words.example: Everyone in the class passed the exam.
words.exampleTranslation: 班上的每个人都通过了考试。
我们进行了愉快的交谈。

words.example: How do you spell your name?
There is water in the bottle.

words.exampleTranslation: 我需要橡皮来改正错误。

words.example: We had so much fun at the party.
words.exampleTranslation: 我们在派对上玩得很开心。

words.exampleTranslation: 我们在学校有很多活动。

words.example: My grandparents live in the countryside.

The park is in the middle of the city.

words.exampleTranslation: 今天对我来说是特别的一天。
